output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?museum ?museumLabel ?areaValue WHERE {
  ?museum wdt:P31 wd:Q1052670 .
  ?museum wdt:P1082 ?area .
  ?area wikibase:quantityAmount ?areaValue .
  ?area wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q174579 .
  FILTER(?areaValue > 8000)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?museum rdfs:label ?museumLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?museumLabel) = "en")
  }
}
